## Concern

What could go wrong?

## Surface Area

- YouTube access
- temporary files
- cache
- MCP client
- n8n workflow
- credentials

## Proposed Guardrail

What rule or implementation should reduce the risk?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Data storage behavior is explicit
- [ ] Temporary files are cleaned up
- [ ] Credentials are not logged
- [ ] Documentation updated
